text:
Kenyan teams failed in their bid to book Olympic slots as the World Athletics Relays started in Bahamas on Saturday night.The winners and second-placed teams in the five disciplines raced on Saturday (yesterday morning in Kenya) secured slots to Paris Olympics but unfortunately no Kenyan relay team was among them.Get Full Access for Ksh299/WeekUnlock the Full Story — Join Thousands of Informed Kenyans TodayUnlock the Truth Now 》Unlimited access to all premium contentUninterrupted ad-free browsing experienceMobile-optimized reading experienceWeekly NewslettersMPesa, Airtel Money and Cards acceptedAlready a subscriber?Log in

title: Kenya's relay teams fail to book Olympics slots at Bahamas meet
author: Bismarck Mutahi and World Athletics
description: 100m Africa champion Omanyala fails to anchor 4x100m team to Paris Olympics.
